note: Direct security audit request with launch context

note: Security hardening request — core trigger phrase

note: Systematic security review — structured audit request

note: Post-incident audit — proactive hardening after an event

note: Security test hardening — Phase 4 of the workflow

note: Near-miss — infrastructure security, not application code
